Home / Services / Vlogging & Videography / Monthly Video Retainer

📅 Monthly Video Retainer

The ultimate content machine for creators and businesses who need a steady stream of professional video. Every month you get 2 full filming days at your location, producing a minimum of 8 finished videos: 2–3 long-form YouTube videos (fully edited with thumbnails and SEO) plus 5–6 short-form social clips (Reels, TikTok, Shorts). We handle everything: monthly content planning sessions, filming with professional equipment, full post-production including editing, colour grading, subtitles, thumbnails, motion graphics, and platform-specific formatting. Think of it as having your own video production team on retainer — without the overhead of hiring staff or buying equipment. Cancel anytime, no long-term contracts. Perfect for YouTubers, coaches, agencies, restaurants, fitness professionals, and any brand committed to consistent video content.

Service Details

Category: Vlogging & Videography

Credits Price: 2000 credits (approx. £2500)

Turnaround: Monthly (ongoing)

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within Monthly (ongoing)
Book Monthly Video Retainer Now

Related Vlogging & Videography Services

  • Social Media Video Pack — Short-form video content pack for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. (300 credits)
  • YouTube Video Production — Full-day YouTube video production including filming, editing, thumbnails, and SEO-optimised descriptions. (800 credits)
  • Corporate & Promo Video — Professional corporate video, brand film, or promotional video for your business website and marketing. (1400 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Monthly Video Retainer?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: Monthly (ongoing)
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
